titleStmt.title: SII 24.113: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 113. (A.R. No. 38 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Records a sale of land at the instance of Vaḷavanārāyaṇa Mūvēndavēḷār, the Śrīkāryam officer of the temple to Puravaṅguḍaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Ādittadēvaṉ alias Ēnādi Araiyaṉ of Puḷiyaṅguḍi in Kiḷiyūr-nāḍu for a flower garden to be named Nidiyābharaṇaṉ-tirunandavanam. The record is dated in the 8th year of the king's reign and the details of the date viz., Makara 25, ba. 8, Monday, Viśākham regularly correspond to A.D. 1126, January 18, Monday, ·30; ·46.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmālai miṭaintu ponmālai tikaḻap pāmālai maṇittiraḷpuyat tirunilamaṭantaiyoṭu jaya makaḷiruppa kanavarai mārvan tanatenap peṟṟut tirumakaḷorutani tiḷaippak kalaimakaḷ coṟtiṟam puṇarnta kaṟpiṉaḷāki viruppoṭu nāvakat tiruppa ticaitoṟum tikiri(ti) yoṭuñ ceṅkolnaṭappa Akilapuvanamuḻuvatuṅ kavippator muḻumati pola veṇkuṭai mimicai niṟpakkaruṅ kali yoḷittu vanpilattiṭaik kiṭappa kuḷattiṭait te
luṅkavimaṉ vilaṅkal mimicai yeṟavum kaliṅka pūmiyaik kaṉa leri parukavum Aimpaṭaipparuvattu vempaṭai tāṅki veṅkai maṇṭalat tāṅki nitiruntu vaṭa ticai Aṭippaṭuttaruḷi tenticait tarumuntavamum tānamun taḻaippa vetamum meymmaiyum Ātiyukam pol talait talaicciṟappa van=taruḷiya va tarum por puliyāṇai pārttivar cūṭa niṟaimaṇi makuṭam muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭi mannuyiṟ kellām Innuyirttāy pol tanṉoḷi parappit tani
ttani ciṟantu maṇmuḻutu kaḷippa manu neṟi vaḷarttu tan koyiṟ koṟṟa vācaṟpuṟattu maṇināvoṭuṅka muraicu kaṇ muḻaṅka vijaiyamum pukaḻum men meloṅki ceḻiyar veñcurampukac ceralar kaṭalpuka Aḻitaru ciṅka ṇarañci neñcalamarak koṅkaḷarotuṅka koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟetticaimanna run=ta ntamārk karaṇenat tiru ce pi Urimaiyiliṟaiñca tollai yeḻulakun toḻu teḻat tonṟi mullaivā kai mukkokkiḻānaṭi Umaiyoṭu paṅkā na Imaiyattiru
ntenapporu yum ni lana makiḻuṅ kaṅkai yoppākiya yar tilatam tiyākapatākai puri ḻal maṭippiṭi punitakuṇa vanitai tiripuvana muḻutuṭaiyāḷivaṉ tiruvuḷḷattu muḻutum Uṭaiyāḷena vamarntinitiruppa cem pon virasim[hāsana*]ttu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya koppara kecarivaṟmarāna tiripuvanacakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 8Āvatu makaranāyaṟṟu Irupattañcān tiyeti peṟṟa (pa) Aparapakkṣattu
[aṣṭami] yum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa vicākatti nāḷ tiruvaraṅkattāḻvār koyil śrīkāriyañ vaḷavanārāyaṇa muventaveḷārevaṟpaṭi śrīvayiṣṇava vāriyam kantāṭai tirumaṅkaiyāḻvānum tiruveṅkaṭappiccarum kantāṭai Ilaṅkai ceṟṟa nampiyum Irāyūr śrīcaṭakopanampiyum nālūr śrījaṭāyudāsarum perumpuliyūrt tirukkaṇapuradāsarum śrīpaṇṭāravāriyam Āritan puṇṭarikan Ārāvamutāna śrī puṇṭari kūnampiyum pāratāyan cirāman Ārāva
mutum kāśyapan ciriḷaṅko pāratā vaṭakopuramuṭaiyānum Āritan cirākava koyiṟ kaṇakku kūttanampalakkūttanāna tiruvaraṅkappiriyanum śrī vayiṣṇavakkaṇakku Ārāvamutu Aṟivariyānāna śrī vaiyiṣṇavappiriyanum Uḷḷiṭṭa Āḻvār kanmikaḷom pāṇṭikulācani vaḷanāṭṭuk kiḷiyūr nāṭṭu puḷiyaṅkuṭip puṟavaṅkuṭaiyān Araiyan Ātittatevanāna Enātiaraiyaṟku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nila
māvatu vaḷattūr nāṭṭu puṟattu veliyil kāverik kulaiyuṭaintu maṇaliṭṭu Aimpatu sammaṟsarattin Uṟdecappayiṟ ceyya Uṇṇātu pāḻ kiṭanta nilattu nāṅka ḷivaṟku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukku Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai tiyākavallivaḷanāṭṭup poykai nāṭṭuk kaṇṭarātit tac caruppetimaṅkalattu Iḷaveḷūr cirāma paṭṭar Amutupaṭip puṟamākak koṇṭuviṭṭa cirāma viḷākattukku me
ṟkum tenpāṟkellai Uṭaiyār tevatānam Ālaṅkuṭi nilattu kku vaṭakkum melpārkellai kāraikkuṭi nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai rājāśiriyan koṅkapperuvaḻikkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta perunānkellai yuḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam veli Innilam veliyum Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷukkuc ceyvikkiṟa nitiyāparaṇan tirunantavanattukkut tirunan=tavānappuṟamāka viṟṟuk kuṭutta Innilam velikkum nilavilai veli 1 O
nṟukku kācon śrīpaṇṭāratte kācoṭukkittaravu koḷḷak kaṭavārākavum Inṉilattait tiruttaṟattirutti tiruttaṟṟa nilattukku puncai varicai veli Onṟukku paḷḷikoṇṭān marakkālā(kkālā)l Eṇkalamāka van=ta nel(l) śrīpaṇṭāratte Aḷantu Inṉilattil mikuti koṇṭu Ittiru nan=tavānañceyvāṟkuk koṟṟaṅkācum Iṭṭu Ittirunan=tavanat kaṭavārākavum Innilattukkukkulai kurumpu ceynir veṭṭi Allatu maṟ
ṟepperpaṭṭa kaṭavārallā nitiyā paraṇaviḷākamenṟu Irājamahentiran tiruccuṟṟu māḷikaiyile kalveṭṭikkoḷḷap peruvārākavum Ivviḷākamum Ittirunan=tavanamum ceyvār Ittiruppatiyil Irukkum dāsarkaḷil Uttaman koḷariyāna patineṭṭu nāṭṭu dāsanum cirāman Āyanāna vaṇṭuvarāpati dāsanum Ivarkaḷum Ivarkaḷ varkattārume kaikkoṇṭu cantirātittavaṟ ceyyakkaṭavarākavum Ippaṭi sammatittu viṟṟukkuṭut
tom Ippuḷiyaṅkuṭaiyār Araiyan nātittavanāṉa Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Ippaṭikku Ivai kantāṭaittirumaṅkai Āḻvān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku ttiruveṅkaṭappiccar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kan=tāṭai Ilaṅkai cenṟa nampiyeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Irāyūr śrīcaṭakopa nampiyeḻuttu Ippaṭikku nālūr śrī caṭāiRead yu for i dāsar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkup perumpuliyūr tirukkaṇṇapura dāsar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku puṇṭarikan Ārāvamutāna śrī puṇṭarikanampiyeḻuttu Ippaṭikkup pāratāyan cirāman Ārāvamutin Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kāśyapan ciṅkan ti
ruvaraṅkanārāyaṇan neḻuttu Ippaṭikku pāradāyan Ippaṭikku pāradāyan pāradāyan vaṭakopuramuṭaiyāneḻuttu Āritan cirākavan cikārimāṟan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku koyiṟkaṇakku kūttan Ampalak kūttanāna tiruvaraṅkappiriyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku śrīveyiṣṇavakkaṇakku Ārāvamutu Aṟivariyā nāna śrī vaiyiṣṇavappiriyan neḻuttu ...
Digital edition of SII 24.113 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
